visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young Asian women stand in a parking lot at night in front of a brightly lit Costco Wholesale sign. One woman wears a black beret, a white furry jacket, and a beige skirt, while the other wears a blue beret, a bright yellow puffer jacket, and holds a small white Maltese dog. The lighting is harsh artificial light from the store's signage and street lamps. (2) The scene transitions to a brightly lit modern indoor home kitchen and laundry area. A woman wearing a black vest over a purple blouse proudly displays three large white plastic bottles of Lysol Laundry Sanitizer to the lens. The background shows a neutral-toned living room with a brown leather sofa and a television. (3) A rapid sequence shows a woman in a blue dress lying prone on a light-colored carpet in a living room area packed with various children's toys and a small wire pet cage. The camera then cuts to a close-up of a hand pouring blue laundry sanitizer into the designated detergent tray of a white washing machine. (4) At a marble kitchen countertop, a woman in a blue knit sweater introduces food items. She holds a blue carton of Koh pure coconut water and a large glass jar of Moccona instant coffee. She demonstrates pouring the coconut water into a glass, followed by dark coffee mixed with milk to create a layered drink. (5) Both women appear together at the kitchen table holding yellow boxes of Weider Ocular Lutein supplements. A macro close-up reveals a stream of fine pinkish powder being emptied from a gold packet onto a translucent blue glass dish. They both consume the supplement directly from the packets, smiling. (6) The women are shown in various settings using digital devices: one woman works at a computer desk with two monitors and a mechanical keyboard, while another sits on a sofa looking at a smartphone. The final scene features them posing with peace signs against a vibrant, saturated digital background depicting a traditional Asian city with red lanterns and fireworks.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你們知道嗎? [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Slogan]: 不出門也能買到好市多 線上買超方便. (3) [Slogan]: 如果只能選三樣 好市多網購 你會買什麼? (4) [Subtitle]: go home. (5) [Subtitle]: 首先是Lysol來舒. (6) [Slogan]: 衣物抗菌液 1.21公升 3入. (7) [Slogan]: 網購送到家 超輕鬆! [Variety]: 洗潔劑非常重. (8) [Subtitle]: 如果家裡有寶寶、毛小孩. (9) [Subtitle]: 還有愛弄髒的大人. [Variety]: 怪人. (10) [Subtitle]: 洗衣服時加一排, 倒入柔軟精的洗劑槽. (11) [Variety]: 溫和除菌 不傷衣料真安心. (12) [Subtitle]: 飲料類我會推薦 椰子水或骨灰罈咖啡. (13) [Slogan]: Koh 純椰子汁 1公升 X 6入 $459 價格實在之外. (14) [Variety]: 就像現剖. (15) [Slogan]: Moccona 中烘焙即溶咖啡粉 400公克. (16) [Subtitle]: 咖啡依造個人口味 調濃淡 加上鮮奶 調成拿鐵超讚. (17) [Slogan]: 最重要是兩個相加 調成為『冰椰美式』 你一定要試試看. (18) [Subtitle]: 第三樣. [Slogan]: 威德適立佳 葉黃素. (19) [Subtitle]: 家中常備真的很安心. (20) [Slogan]: 一盒有 60入. (21) [Slogan]: 小巧又方便攜帶. [Variety]: 獨立包裝. (22) [Slogan]: 細微顆粒 粉包設計. (23) [Subtitle]: 不喜歡吞膠囊的朋友們有福了. (24) [Variety]: 老人小孩超友善. (25) [Variety]: 吃起來香甜莓果味. 真的超好吃. (26) [Subtitle]: 長時間用眼前 別忘了照顧好自己的雙眼. (27) [Variety]: 游離型 小分子好吸收. (28) [Subtitle]: 並且選用 全美最多醫師推薦的專利葉黃素. (29) [Subtitle]: 添加植物性的 Omega3 以及明亮草、山桑子. (30) [Variety]: 眼睛健康更升級. (31) [Subtitle]: 不論是手機電腦不離手的你. (32) [Subtitle]: 認真讀書的孩子們 以及最親愛的家人長輩們. (33) [Variety]: 這是很棒的選擇! (34) [Subtitle]: 最重要是奶素也可以吃喔! (35) [Variety]: 這世界很美 葉黃素守護視力 給全家人最好的保護!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appear throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two women: one often wears a black beret and dark vest, the other wears a blue beret and yellow puffer jacket or blue sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco exterior at night, a modern home interior with a living room and kitchen, a home office, and a festive CGI animation of a Chinese city.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, fast-tempo electronic pop BGM featuring prominent synthesized drums and a bright melodic synth line. A female voice with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone and clear articulation provides energetic narration. A distinct 'Whoosh' SFX occurs as the scene transitions from the exterior to the interior. (2) The background music maintains a consistent 128 BPM drive with a heavy kick drum pulse. A 'Pop' or bubble-like sound effect is heard when graphical elements appear on screen. The narrator's speech rate is high-density, conveying a sense of excitement and urgency in the product recommendations. (3) Incidental sounds of liquid pouring into a glass and the light clinking of a metal spoon against glass are clearly audible above the music bed. The BGM remains in a bright major tonality. A high-pitched 'Ding' sound effect emphasizes the price and product details displayed in the graphics. (4) The final phase features a 'Sparkle' jingle and several light 'Stinger' transition sound effects as the scene shifts between the office and reading environments. The narration concludes with a warm, high-arousal valence, and the music swells before a clean fade-out. The overall signal-to-noise ratio is high, with studio-quality vocal clarity.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item 1 Showcase -> Item 2 Showcase -> Item 3 In-depth Showcase -> Final Scenic Greeting
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote specific high-value household products and supplements available at Costco's online store by demonstrating their practical usage and health benefits in a high-energy, vlog-style format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed explanation of supplement benefits, close-ups of product packaging, and call-to-action on product variety.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes social-media-native editing techniques, such as high-density text overlays and rapid transitions, to maintain engagement while promoting multiple commercial brands.
